condition.description: Defines an IAM condition that specifies when the binding is effective, using a title, description, and an expression written in Common Expression Language (CEL).

instance.description: Specifies the Spanner instance to which IAM bindings will be applied; must already exist in the specified project.

members.description: List of IAM members to be assigned the specified role for the Spanner instance. Must be in the format 'user:email', 'serviceAccount:email', etc.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to be applied to the Spanner instance, such as roles/spanner.viewer or roles/spanner.admin.
